summary: There are no clear indications linking a particular type of rest like mesio-occlusal or disto-occlusal directly to bar-clasp assembly use; thus, it cannot be definitively stated which one predominantly guides its application based solely on this information provided about genetic tests irrelevant to prosthodontics techniques.
